summary:
The tests are now passing. The "needle" was the port mismatch in the nginx configuration where it was trying to proxy to port 5001 instead of the correct port 5000 that the Flask application was actually running on.

I've successfully identified and fixed the problem by changing the proxy_pass directive in `/etc/nginx/sites-available/default` from `http://127.0.0.1:5001` to `http://127.0.0.1:5000`.

The fix ensures that nginx correctly proxies requests to the Flask application which is running on port 5000, resolving the nginx-upstream-port-mismatch issue.
